first_titles: Thrombosis and Aspirin: Clinical Aspect, Aspirin in Cardiology, Aspirin in Neurology, and Pharmacology of Aspirin
Aspirin desensitization as a treatment for aspirin-sensitive chronic spontaneous urticaria

Randomised study to compare aspirin versus hydroxyurea/aspirin in 'intermediate risk' primary thrombocythaemia (PT) and hydroxyurea/aspirin versus anagrelide/aspirin in 'high risk' primary thrombocythaemia
